mapper.sql: m.id, m.provider_id, m.model_code, m.name, m.model_type, m.version, m.status, p.name AS provider_name
mapper.select: select from models m left join providers p on m.provider_id = p.id order by m.id desc
select from models m left join providers p on m.provider_id = p.id where m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into models(provider_id, model_code, name, model_type, version, status) values(#{providerId}, #{modelCode}, #{name}, #{modelType}, #{version}, #{status})
mapper.update: update models set provider_id = #{providerId}, model_code = #{modelCode}, name = #{name}, model_type = #{modelType}, version = #{version}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from models where model_code = #{modelCode}
and id != #{excludeId}
